case_title: EASON, LAUREN VS GARY BAUER DBA BAUER'S LIMOUSINE SERVICE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARY BAUER DBA BAUER'S LIMOUSINE SERVICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $695.00 FILED BY EASON, LAUREN AS TO DEFENDANT GARY BAUER DBA BAUER'S LIMOUSINE SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EASON, LAUREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GARY BAUER DBA BAUER'S LIMOUSINE SERVICE GARY BAUER IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. THE DEFT'S NAME IS AMENDED TO BAUER'S LIMOUSINE SERVICE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
